message:
feat(abi,core): add positional printf arg support and harden ABI entrypoints

Extend FormatSpec/Width/Precision in frankenlibc-core with positional
argument syntax (%n$, *n$), adding parse_positional_index and
uses_arg/position helpers. Refactor render_printf and all
extract_va_args/extract_err_args/extract_syslog_args/extract_wprintf_args
macros to dispatch through the new positional_printf_arg_plan() when any
%n$ specifier is detected, preserving sequential fallback otherwise.

Additionally: fix dl_iterate_phdr to retry host-symbol bootstrap on cache
miss and return 0 early for null callbacks; add lazy init call in
prefer_host_stdio_streams so it auto-bootstraps on first query; expose
malloc_swap_reentry_depth_for_tests / malloc_restore_reentry_depth_for_tests
test hooks for reentrant-allocator path coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
